name: DeepSeek-R1-0528
archDisplay: DeepSeekMoE: 256 routed + 1 shared expert, top-8 routing, 61 layers (3 dense + 58 MoE), Multi-head Latent Attention (MLA)
note: Major R1 refresh with deeper chain-of-thought (AIME24 79.8 to 91.4), fewer hallucinations, and added JSON/function calling; approached o3/Gemini 2.5 Pro.
tpsNote: 671B MoE far exceeds a single 24GB 4090; Unsloth's dynamic quants shrink it to ~185GB for CPU-offload rigs, still requiring far more than one consumer GPU.
